title: ophrys candica var. cytherea
intro: Ophrys candica var. cytherea, also known as the Orchis or Wild Orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the Orchidaceae family. The medicinal properties of Ophrys candica var. cytherea include its potential antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which may be used to treat wounds and reduce swelling. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties, which help to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs. In herbal preparations, Ophrys candica var. cytherea is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its roots are dried and used in medicinal remedies.
